solutions.title: Solution (Neon)
solutions.content:
fun main
()
{
val
(
n
,
m
)
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val used
=
Array
(
n
)
{
readLine
()!!
}.
toSet
()
repeat
(
readLine
()!!.
toInt
())
{
val t
=
readLine
()!!
val s
=
(
0.
.
m
).
map
{
i
->
t
.
removeRange
(
i
..
i
)
}.
toSet
()
println
(
s
.
count
{
used
.
contains
(
it
)
}
